parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "qwen-plus",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are a B2B sales email writer for DEL ILLUMINATION, a Sino-German solar street lighting manufacturer that combines German design standards with cost-efficient manufacturing in China, offering European quality at competitive prices. Their products are used in government road projects, EPC contractor projects, and by distributors.

Write a cold outreach email to the following person:
Name: {{ $json.first_name }} {{ $json.last_name }}
Title: {{ $json.title }}
Company: {{ $json.company }}
Industry: {{ $json.industry }}
Country: {{ $json.country }}
Keywords: {{ $json.keywords }}

Follow this exact structure and spacing:
1. Line 1: Start with:
Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

2. Paragraph 1: 1–2 personalized sentences referencing something specific about {{ $json.company }} and their work in {{ $json.country }}. Use the Keywords field to reference a specific project focus or activity.

[BLANK LINE]

3. Paragraph 2–4: Then continue with this exact text, do not change it, and keep each sentence on its own line with blank lines between paragraphs:

We specialize in solar street lighting solutions for road and public infrastructure, mainly supporting EPC contractors and distributors.

Our products are designed in Germany and manufactured in China, helping partners balance quality and project budget.

If this is relevant to your current or upcoming projects, we would be glad to share suitable options based on your application.

Best regards,

Michael Chang
Sales Director

DEL ILLUMINATION
Sino-German Solar Street Light Manufacturer
European Quality, Chinese Pricing

At the very end, after the email, output exactly this format on new lines:
SHORT_REF: [write a 4-6 word phrase summarizing their main project focus, extracted from the Keywords field]
CORE_ACTIVITY: [write one short sentence describing what this company mainly does, based on Industry and Keywords]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the email body (with clear blank lines between paragraphs) followed by SHORT_REF and CORE_ACTIVITY lines
- Respect line breaks exactly as shown above
- Do NOT change anything in the fixed email body text
- Sound human, not like AI
- Do NOT use generic phrases like "I hope this email finds you well"
Style rules:
- Do NOT use the em dash symbol (—) anywhere in the email.
- If you feel like using an em dash, split into two shorter sentences or use a comma instead.
- Do NOT use "--" or " - " as replacements either."
    }
  ]
}
